product: SAP Cloud Integration (SAP Integration Suite) — OData API v2, Message Processing Logs

service_root.rule: service root URI = <tenant url> + /api/v1; resource path appended, e.g. /api/v1/MessageProcessingLogs
service_root.protocol: OData specification version 2.0 (d-envelope JSON when $format=json or Accept: application/json)

authentication.scheme: basic authentication (the API also supports OAuth; this fixture uses basic)
authentication.header: Authorization: Basic base64(user:password) on EVERY request, including followed __next links
authentication.required_role_hint: role template MonitoringDataRead guards MPL reads
authentication.401: wrong credentials -> HTTP 401, WWW-Authenticate: Basic, empty body; must surface as kind=unauthorized without leaking credentials
authentication.403: missing role -> HTTP 403 with an OData error document; must surface as kind=forbidden preserving error.code

query_serialization.filter_property_order: Status, CustomStatus, IntegrationFlowName, LogStart gt, LogEnd lt — joined with ' and '
query_serialization.encoding: spaces percent-encoded as %20, colons as %3A, single quotes left literal; string literals single-quoted
query_serialization.datetime_literals: datetime'YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss' — interpreted as UTC by the API; zone offsets are NOT parsed, so inputs carrying Z or +hh:mm must be folded into UTC and the suffix dropped
query_serialization.inlinecount: $inlinecount=allpages puts a decimal string __count in the d envelope

response_envelope.server_paging: the API returns at most 1000 entries per call; a __next link (with $skiptoken) identifies the next partial set and MUST be requested verbatim — the mock plants a srvMarker query parameter that a rebuilt URL loses

log_entry_properties.IntegrationFlowName: deployed artifact that processed the message
log_entry_properties.CustomStatus: flow-defined status, preserved verbatim alongside Status
log_entry_properties.LogStart_LogEnd: /Date(ms)/ values; LogEnd is null while the message is still processing
log_entry_properties.ErrorInformation: navigation property; when not expanded it appears as { "__deferred": { "uri": ... } }

error_information.rule: GET <deferred uri>/$value returns the error text for the log (text body, not a d-envelope)
error_information.no_link: entries without a deferred ErrorInformation link produce no API traffic

error_document.rule: error.code and message.value are decoded; the full error object including innererror is preserved verbatim

mock_fixture.tenant_url: loopback http://127.0.0.1:{port} standing in for the service-key url parameter
